executives.name: Jack Lundin
executives.background: Mr. Lundin has over 15 years of experience in the natural resource sector. He was appointed President and CEO in December 2023. Previously, he served as President and CEO of Bluestone Resources Inc. and held various roles within the Lundin Group of companies, including at Lundin Gold Inc.'s Fruta del Norte project.

executives.name: Teitur Poulsen
executives.background: Mr. Poulsen has over 25 years of experience in the resource industry. He joined Lundin Mining as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in 2023. Prior to this, he was CFO of Lundin Energy AB.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Juan Roca
executives.background: Mr. Roca has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He was appointed Chief Operating Officer in 2023. He previously held senior operational roles at Freeport-McMoRan and other major mining firms.

executives.name: Kristen Mariuzza
executives.background: Ms. Mariuzza has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environmental and regulatory affairs. She has held various leadership roles within Lundin Mining, including Managing Director of the Eagle Mine.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Sustainability, Health and Safety

executives.name: Adam Lundin
executives.background: Mr. Lundin has many years of experience in the natural resource sector. He is the Chair of the Board and previously served as President and CEO of Josemaria Resources Inc.

executives.name: Andrew Hastings
executives.background: Andrew P. Hastings is Executive Vice President and General Counsel. He joined Alcoa in 2023 from Lundin Mining Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Counsel

executives.name: Ashley Heppenstall
executives.background: Mr. Heppenstall has over 30 years of experience in the oil and gas and resource sectors. He was the President and CEO of Lundin Petroleum AB from 2002 to 2015.

executives.name: Brian Edgar
executives.background: Mr. Edgar is a lawyer and has served as a director of numerous public companies. He was the President and CEO of Dome Ventures Corp. until its merger with Vicuna Resources Inc.

executives.name: Donald Charter
executives.background: Mr. Charter is a professional director with extensive experience in the mining industry and capital markets. He has served on numerous public company boards.

executives.name: Juliana Lam
executives.background: Ms. Lam is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in financial management and corporate strategy across various industries.

executives.name: Maria Olivia Recart
executives.background: Ms. Recart is an economist with significant experience in the mining sector and public policy, having served as Vice President at BHP and Undersecretary of Finance in Chile.

executives.name: Nathan Monash
executives.background: Mr. Monash is the Vice President, Business Sustainability. He has over 20 years of experience in the mining sector, focusing on sustainability and corporate affairs. He previously held roles at AngloGold Ashanti and the World Economic Forum.

executives.name: Victoria McMillan
executives.background: Ms. McMillan is a finance professional with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the CFO of several junior exploration companies.

board_of_directors.name: Adam Lundin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lundin has many years of experience in the natural resource sector. He is the Chair of the Board and previously served as President and CEO of Josemaria Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Jack Lundin
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Lundin Mining. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: Jinhee Magie
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Magie is the CFO and Senior Vice President of Lundin Mining Corporation.
